completed_tasks.name: Pull normal web frontend from remote
Fix local workflow defects found during manual UAT
completed_tasks.progress: Removed translit prompts, added CLI workflow runner, fixed not_found validation, fixed over-eager GDP preflight clarification, hydrated source cards from SQLite, enabled zip-backed parquet extraction, fixed FedStat period/geography filtering, and made the GDP Russia 2024 case reach a non-empty DatasetArtifact.

completed_tasks.name: Make frontend response useful in local fallback mode
completed_tasks.progress: Fallback narrator now summarizes concrete DatasetArtifact records; frontend renders answer_blocks and dataset row preview instead of only sources.

remaining_tasks.name: Decide whether post-UAT hotfixes should be split into focused commits or folded into a Phase 2 verification commit
Clean or intentionally preserve generated manual/workflow run artifacts
Continue manual UAT over the remaining golden/realistic cases, especially factor/causal queries that currently only extract numeric series in local fallback mode
Run full phase verification and update manual UAT evidence after commit policy is chosen

blockers.description: Local fallback mode does not perform a real causal/factor analysis; it only reports extracted numeric rows and warns when a query asks for factors/drivers.
blockers.workaround: Use live narrator/factor pipeline for jury-quality factor answers, or add a deterministic factor-analysis route with supporting indicators.

blockers.description: Many generated workflow/manual run directories are untracked and should not be blindly committed.
blockers.workaround: Review .planning/phases/02-jury-mvp/manual-runs/ and workflow-runs/phase2-*; keep only deliberate evidence artifacts.

blockers.description: Some existing SUMMARY/plan docs contain placeholder/TBD markers from earlier work.
blockers.workaround: Inspect grep output before claiming milestone archival completeness.

human_actions_pending.context: User was manually testing the new web frontend at http://localhost:8787 and reviewing whether answers are useful enough.
Current dirty tree includes both real code fixes and generated run artifacts; decide which should be committed.

decisions.decision: Use the new app.web frontend on port 8787 instead of old Streamlit for current manual testing.
decisions.rationale: Remote commit b66e66a added a normal browser frontend; user explicitly wanted to use that rather than the awful old UI.

decisions.decision: Keep local_mode fallback honest instead of pretending to answer causal factor questions.
decisions.rationale: Numbers must come from deterministic artifacts; fallback can summarize records but cannot infer causes without supporting factor data and narrator logic.

decisions.decision: Treat source cards retrieved from Qdrant/BM25 as lightweight pointers and hydrate them from the Phase 1 SQLite catalog before coverage/extraction.
decisions.rationale: Retrieval snippets do not carry resource_id/local_paths, so coverage could not find FedStat parquet files.

decisions.decision: Select extraction source by requested coverage, not by first ok source.
decisions.rationale: The first source for GDP Russia 2024 lacked 2024 data; source 57395 had the requested period and produced a dataset artifact.

next_action: Resume with git status, inspect the dirty diff, decide commit scope for code fixes versus generated run artifacts, then continue manual UAT from http://localhost:8787.
context_notes: Branch is codex/phase-2-jury-mvp-planning. Qdrant server is expected at http://localhost:6333 with collection phase1_source_cards. Web server was running on PID 40588 at 127.0.0.1:8787 when paused. Latest targeted verification passed: 93 tests, 1 LangGraph warning. Browser check confirmed the factors/GDP 2012 query now renders answer text, answer_blocks, limitations, and dataset rows.
